# uptimekuma_notification_smsir (Resource)

SMS.ir notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_smsir" "example" {
  name       = "SMS.ir Notifications"
  api_key    = "your-smsir-api-key"
  number     = "09123456789"
  template   = "123456"
  is_active  = true
  is_default = false
}

resource "uptimekuma_notification_smsir" "multiple_recipients" {
  name       = "SMS.ir Alerts"
  api_key    = "your-smsir-api-key"
  number     = "09123456789,09987654321"
  template   = "123456"
  is_active  = true
  is_default = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) The SMS.ir API key used to send notifications.
- `name` (String) Notification name
- `number` (String) The recipient phone number(s). Multiple numbers can be specified as a comma-separated list.
- `template` (String) The pre-approved SMS.ir template ID used for sending the message.

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
